title: The Boeing Company (BA) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
text: Boeing (BA) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

title: U.S. Army grounds Boeing-made Chinook helicopters fleet
text: The U.S. Army has temporarily grounded its fleet of about 400 Chinook helicopters due to a risk of engine fires, a spokeswoman told Reuters on Tuesday.

title: Boeing, Honeywell stocks drop after Army grounds Chinook helicopters
text: Shares of Boeing Co. BA, -1.94% and Honeywell International Inc. HON, -0.89% dropped around 0.3% each in the late session Tuesday following news that the U.S. Army has grounded its entire fleet of Chinook helicopters due to risk of engine fires out of an "abundance of caution," The Wall Street Journal reported. Army officials said they know of a few engine fires involving the helicopters, resulting in no injuries or deaths.

title: Boeing customer Ryanair says MAX 10 won't be certified by year-end
text: Boeing appears to have accepted it will not be able to certify its MAX 10 aircraft by a year-end deadline but it remains possible that U.S. lawmakers could extend the deadline, major customer Ryanair told Reuters on Tuesday.

title: Taiwan's China Airlines to buy 16 Boeing 787s in $4.6 billion deal
text: (Reuters) -Taiwan's China Airlines Ltd said on Tuesday it would buy 16 Boeing Co 787 widebody planes to replace its ageing fleet of Airbus A330s following a widely-watched contest held against the backdrop of regional tensions.

title: BetterInvesting™ Magazine Update on TJX Companies and The Boeing Company
text: TROY, Mich. , Aug. 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Editorial Advisory and Securities Review Committee of BetterInvesting Magazine today announced TJX Companies Inc. (NYSE: TJX) as its "Stock to Study" and The Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) as its "Undervalued Stock" in the November 2022 issue for investors' informational and educational use.

title: UPS places order for eight more Boeing 767 freighters
text: UPS placed an order for eight 767 freighter aircraft from Boeing that the package delivery company will start receiving in 2025 to maintain an updated fleet.

title: Boeing receives order for eight more 767 freighter jets from UPS
text: Boeing Co said on Monday package delivery giant United Parcel Services Inc had placed an order for additional eight 767 freighter jets.

title: Boeing gets order from UPS for 8 more 767 Freighters
text: Boeing Co. BA, -2.86% announced Monday an order from United Parcel Service Inc. UPS, -2.96% for eight more 767 Freighters. That would bring package delivery giant UPS's fleet of 767 Freighters to 108.

title: Boeing Announces UPS Purchase of Eight Additional 767s
text: SEATTLE , Aug. 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Boeing [NYSE:BA] today announced an order from UPS for eight more 767 Freighters. The incremental order will increase UPS's 767 Freighter fleet to 108 airplanes, enabling the global carrier to further modernize and sustainably grow its fleet.

title: Boeing's Problems Mount (GE and Raytheon Take Note)
text: The aircraft manufacturer is struggling to raise the production rate on the 737 MAX.

title: Boeing (BA) Delivers 4 Grey Wolf Helicopters to US Air Force
text: Boeing (BA) announces that it has delivered four MH-139A Grey Wolf test helicopters to the U.S. Air Force as part of the $2.4-billion contract.

title: NASA and Boeing push back first Starliner astronaut mission to 2023
text: NASA and Boeing are now targeting early 2023 for the first crewed flight of Boeing's long-delayed Starliner spacecraft, officials said during a joint press conference Thursday.

title: Boeing targets early 2023 for first Starliner mission carrying astronauts
text: Boeing is targeting February 2023 to fly its first Starliner mission with astronauts aboard to the International Space Station, a senior NASA official told reporters on Thursday, as the aerospace giant nears the final leg of a costly and much-delayed development timeline.

title: Sky-high rents hit the aircraft market as Boeing jets top $300,000 a month

title: Boeing says plans to build on existing investments in India
text: Planemaker Boeing plans to build on its existing investments in India in areas such as defence supply chains and manufacturing, the company said on Wednesday.

title: Boeing: Less Attractive Now
text: Boeing has outperformed the market since our previous article in June. We posited BA has likely bottomed out, seeing accumulation at its June lows, despite the market's pessimism. However, we posit that its recent recovery has likely captured most of its near-term upside, despite the resumption of its 787 deliveries. Therefore, BA stock's valuation seems more well-balanced now.

title: Kaman Fuzing Receives Award From the Boeing Company for Standoff Land Attack Missile Expanded Response (SLAM-ER) Program
text: MIDDLETOWN, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kaman Corporation (NYSE: KAMN), announced that its Kaman Precision Products Fuzing division located in Middletown, Connecticut, has received an award from The Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) for the Standoff Land Attack Missile Expanded Response (SLAM-ER) program. Kaman is contracted to support engineering for obsolescence redesign and production of 650 safe and arming fuze systems for the SLAM-ER advanced precision-guided, air-launched cruise missile. title: The 5 Best Space Stocks to Buy Now
text: After the Russian invasion of Ukraine and the sanctions it faces as a result, the idea of a second space race has resurfaced. Russia plans to sever its 20-year-long space partnership with the U.S and hinted at building its own space station as early as 2028.

title: American just received the first Boeing 787 delivery in 15 months. Here's why the FAA paused deliveries of the jet and how it impacted airlines.
text: American told Insider in December that 13 Dreamliners would not be delivered in time for summer, forcing the carrier to cut five international routes.

title: Potential hack for some Boeing planes fixed -researchers
text: A digital vulnerability in the computer systems used on some Boeing Co aircraft that could have allowed malicious hackers to modify data and cause pilots to make dangerous miscalculations has been fixed, security researchers said on Friday.

title: Wide-body jet demand humming again as Boeing 787 rejoins the fray
text: Boeing Co's 787 Dreamliner has returned to the world market for newly delivered aircraft at a time when demand for wide-body jetliners is finally stirring to life after a prolonged slump.

title: Aviation Capital Group Announces Delivery of One Boeing 737-9 MAX to Copa Airlines
text: NEWPORT BEACH, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Aviation Capital Group LLC (“ACG”) announced the delivery of one new Boeing 737-9 MAX aircraft on long-term lease to Copa Airlines. title: Boeing delivers first 787 in a year
text: Boeing delivered a 787 Dreamliner to American Airlines on Wednesday, the first of that aircraft to be sent to a customer in over a year due to defects discovered in the plane.

title: Timeline: Boeing delivers first 787 Dreamliner in more than a year

text: America's top weapons contractors had another banner year in 2021 despite labor and supply chain issues linked to the COVID pandemic and other global economic challenges, according to the latest Defense News Top 100.

title: Boeing deliveries slip to five-month low in July
text: Boeing jetliner deliveries fell to a five-month low of 26 airplanes in July, highlighting pressure on global supply chains as it prepares to resume deliveries of the 787 Dreamliner.

title: U.S. FAA approves first 787 Dreamliner for deliver since 2021 - sources
text: The Federal Aviation Administration on Monday approved the first Boeing 787 Dreamliner for delivery since May 2021, sources told Reuters.

title: US regulators clear Boeing to resume 787 deliveries
text: After more than a year, aviation giant Boeing will be allowed to resume deliveries of its 787 Dreamliner aircraft "in the coming days," after the company made changes to its manufacturing process, US air safety regulators announced Monday.

title: Boeing stock spikes up after FAA says 787 Dreamliner deliveries could resume in coming days
text: Shares of Boeing Co. BA, +2.18% spiked 2.3% higher in afternoon trading Monday, after the Federal Aviation Administration said it expects 787 Dreamliner deliveries to resume "in the coming days." The stock was up less than 1% just prior to the afternoon spike up.

title: FAA says it expects Boeing resume 787 deliveries in days
text: The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) on Monday said that Boeing has made necessary changes to ensure that its 787 Dreamliner meets all certification standards and added that it expect deliveries to resume in the coming days.

title: Air Lease chairman says progress payments to Airbus, Boeing under scanner
text: Air Lease Corp's chairman said on Thursday the lessor will examine progress payments that the company makes to Boeing Co and Airbus SE, as deliveries of aircraft get delayed due to labor and engine shortages.

title: Machinists at 3 Boeing plants in Midwest ratify new contract
text: ST. LOUIS — Nearly 2,500 workers at three Boeing defense plants in the Midwest voted Wednesday to ratify a contract that their union said will raise pay by an average of 14% over three years and add inflation adjustments.

title: Analysis-Pelosi's Taiwan visit clouds Boeing's China reset hopes
text: Boeing Co faced added uncertainty over crucial plane deliveries to China on Wednesday as a visit to Taipei by U.S. House of Representatives Speaker Nancy Pelosi angered Beijing and risked stoking Sino-U.S. trade tensions.

title: Boeing defense workers to vote on revised contract offer
text: Boeing defense workers in the St. Louis area on Wednesday are set to vote on the company's revised contract offer after they canceled a strike that had been set to start Monday.

title: Boeing stock surges to lead the Dow's gainers after 787 deliveries could resume after hurdle cleared with FAA
text: Shares of Boeing Co. BA, +0.14% ran up 4.7% early Monday, to pace the Dow Jones Industrial Average's DJIA, +0.97% premarket gainers, after the aerospace and defense giant reportedly cleared a hurdle with the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) that could allow it to resume deliveries of its 787 airliner. The FAA said it would approve Boeing's process for validating fixes to each 787 plane before they are delivered to customers, according to an Associated Press report.

title: Boeing Stock Rises as Strike Temporarily Averted, 787 Cleared for Deliveries
text: A strike set to begin Monday at three Boeing defense plants has been put off temporarily, and the FAA approves Boeing's plan to correct production problems with the 787 Dreamliner.

title: Boeing to establish R&D facility on sustainable aviation fuel, electrification in Japan
text: Boeing Co said on Monday it plans to establish a research and development (R&D) facility in Japan to further development in sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) and to advance electric and hydrogen aircraft technology.

title: Boeing to Open Japan Research Center and Expand Sustainability Partnerships
text: TOKYO , Aug. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Boeing [NYSE:BA] will strengthen its partnership with Japan by opening a new Boeing Research and Technology (BR&T) center. The facility will focus on sustainability and support a newly expanded cooperation agreement with Japan's Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI).

title: Is Boeing Stock is Ready for Lift-Off?
text: Aerospace giant Boeing (NYSE: BA) stock has rallied strong off its post-pandemic lows at $113.02 to cut its losses on the year to (-24%).
